name: Danube Home
suggested_pitch: A visible WhatsApp button and simplified navigation could help convert more online visitors into showroom appointments.
message_email:
Subject: Quick wins for danubehome.com

Hi,

I came across Danube Home while researching furniture retailers in Dubai. Your product photography and category range are impressive, but I noticed two things that might be costing you online enquiries.

First, there's no WhatsApp or chat button visible on the homepage — in the UAE market, customers expect to tap and talk instantly. Second, the main navigation has over twelve top-level items, which can overwhelm visitors before they find what they need.

Adding a floating WhatsApp button and streamlining the nav to seven or eight key categories could noticeably increase visitor-to-enquiry conversion.

Would you be open to a free 15-minute walkthrough of these quick improvements?

Best regards
message_linkedin: Hi — I took a look at danubehome.com and your product range is strong. Two quick observations: there's no WhatsApp or chat button for instant contact, and the navigation has 12+ items which can overwhelm visitors. A floating WhatsApp button and a trimmed nav could help convert more browsers into buyers. Happy to share specifics if useful.
